title: The Balance Experiment — Phase 2 Synopsis
body: Phase 2 of The Balance Experiment documents flow optimization from April 28 through May 14, tracking nitrate behavior, BBA response, evaporation, and ecosystem stability before the planned Phase 3 air cycle experiment.
quick_facts: Phase 2 synopsis; April 28–May 14, 2026; Day 17–Day 33; flow optimization; nitrate behavior tracking; BBA response; ecosystem stability before Phase 3
nitrate_ppm: Low range (~5–10) to ~40 before reset; low range (~10) current
